chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – The reclining and the folded (postures)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/566)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/566)
text: لَا يَجُوزُ لِلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَحْتَبِيَ مُقَابِلَ الْكَعْبَةِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It is not allowed for the man that he sits cross-legged facing the Kabah’.
en.sarwar: 5. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Muhammad ibn Ali from Ali ibn Asbat from certain individuals of our people from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “It is not permissible for a man to perform al-’Ihtiba’ across the Ka’bah.”
